hero.heading: Build a home that's Yours
hero.attention: For streamers, artists, musicians, makers, educators, and creators.
hero.tagline: Own your content. Build your community. Escape the algorithm goblins.
hero.ctaText: Take the survey or get email updates.

pain.body1: Most creators are juggling platforms instead of building a foundation.
pain.subheading2: Algorithms change. Platforms disappear. Accounts get suspended.
pain.body2: 10,000 followers sounds impressive…but if you can't reach them tomorrow without asking a platform for permission, do you really own that audience?

vision.html: I'm Building Something for Creators Like Us

action.html: Take the Survey or Join the Email List
